steps.title: Track the changed data point
steps.content: Only the smallest recorded weight changes. It decreases by $12$ pounds, so it remains the smallest value in the sorted list.

steps.title: Use the median position
steps.content: With $17$ horses, the median is the $9$th value after sorting. Changing only the smallest value does not move the $9$th value, so the median remains the same.

steps.title: Compare the other measures
steps.content: The mean changes because the total changes. The range changes because the minimum decreases. The standard deviation changes because the spread changes. The only listed value that remains the same is the median. The answer is B.
